title: Sales Manager Vacancy at RMZ Corp - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at RMZ Corp - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
